# FERROS Agent Rollout Manifest

Last updated: 2026-05-06

## Active Agents

- `ferros-agent.agent.md`
- `ferros-agent-architect.agent.md`
- `ferros-core.agent.md`
- `ferros-subcore.agent.md`
- `ferros-documentation-architect.agent.md`
- `ferros-backup-officer.agent.md`
- `ferros-audit-recovery-officer.agent.md`

## Support Agents

- `ferros-core-lane-architect.agent.md`
- `ferros-subcore-lane-architect.agent.md`

## Archived Agents

Archived specs are preserved under `.github/agents/_archive/` and are not part of the active near-term roster.

## Rollout Notes

- Active roster is intentionally narrow for safety and operational clarity.
- New family expansion should flow through `ferros-agent-architect.agent.md` in bounded recursion cycles.
- Symbolic role naming should stay in display surfaces; capability-bearing runtime names remain explicit and safety-first.
